name: sdd
description: Spec-Driven Development: REQ ids, specs/tasks traceability, covers_requirements in plans.

rules.guidance: Every requirement has a unique REQ-NNN id. Tests, tasks, and plan stages reference REQ ids in their descriptions. No untraced requirements.
Plan stages list `covers_requirements: [REQ-NNN, ...]`. Tests assert the associated REQ is satisfied. DoD checklist items map to REQ ids.
Specifications and acceptance criteria are written before tasks are created. Tasks reference the spec. Implementation changes that deviate from the spec require spec update first.
Test names or docstrings include the REQ-NNN they verify. Traceability matrices can be generated from test annotations to show spec coverage.
